name: @insitue/companion
description: Local companion process: loopback WS, project sandbox, agent edit gateway.

scripts.build: tsup src/cli.ts src/cli-connect.ts src/server.ts src/agent/proposals.ts src/agent/claude-code/normalize.ts src/agent/claude-code/mcp-server.ts src/edit/gateway.ts src/edit/mutator.ts src/edit/git.ts --format esm --dts --clean --external ws --external commander --external zod --external execa --external diff --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
scripts.dev: tsup src/cli.ts src/cli-connect.ts src/server.ts src/agent/proposals.ts src/agent/claude-code/normalize.ts src/agent/claude-code/mcp-server.ts src/edit/gateway.ts src/edit/mutator.ts src/edit/git.ts --format esm --watch --external ws --external commander --external zod --external execa --external diff --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
